overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling along a wet multi-lane highway from industrial outskirts toward the Night City skyline at dawn. The vehicle passes smokestacks, billboards, and the iconic 'Night City' welcome sign before taking an exit ramp into a graffiti-covered industrial zone.

events.description: passing under concrete overpass into open highway section
overtaking a white sedan on the left lane

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on the multi-lane highway, hands visible on the steering wheel

notable_agents.action: white sedan being overtaken in the left lane

entered.detail: tall gray concrete noise reduction wall running parallel to the highway
tall factory chimneys emitting black smoke against the cloudy sky
large metal lattice electricity pylons lining the roadside
concrete bridge structure spanning across the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: Driving along a wet multi-lane highway through an industrial outskirts zone. A concrete sound barrier runs along the left while power transmission towers line the right. Black smoke rises from distant factory smokestacks as the vehicle passes under an overpass and overtakes a white sedan.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial highway corridor with large billboards

events.description: large illuminated billboard for 'TIGER CLAW' becomes visible on the right
Night City skyline with futuristic skyscrapers becomes visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed while passing commercial billboards and approaching the city

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement display showing 'TIGER CLAW' branding
distant futuristic skyscrapers of Night City visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway as the industrial zone transitions to a commercial corridor lined with large digital billboards. The distant Night City skyline becomes visible ahead while the concrete barriers give way to open roadside views.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to city center with palm tree median

events.description: passing under the large overhead 'WELCOME TO NIGHT CITY' sign
approaching highway exit ramp with moderate traffic ahead

agents.ego_description: driving toward the city center, passing under the welcome sign and approaching the exit

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane, slowing for exit

entered.detail: large overhead gantry sign reading 'NIGHT CITY' with 'WELCOME TO' text above
tall palm trees lining the right side of the highway median
tall modern glass and steel buildings of the city center becoming prominent

segments.scene_description: Approaching the Night City limits with palm trees lining the road and futuristic skyscrapers looming larger ahead. The vehicle passes under the iconic overhead welcome sign as traffic density increases and the exit ramp approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp leading to industrial district

events.description: taking the exit ramp and beginning a sharp right turn
entering industrial area with graffiti-covered warehouse walls

agents.ego_description: navigating the exit ramp and executing a right turn into the industrial zone

notable_agents.action: black car ahead on the exit ramp slowing for the turn

entered.detail: orange and white striped concrete barrier along the curved exit ramp
industrial building wall covered in colorful graffiti art and murals
large concrete industrial building with flat roof and metal siding
elevated highway structure crossing above the exit ramp

segments.scene_description: Taking the exit ramp and turning right into a gritty industrial district. The scene shifts from the open highway to a more enclosed space beneath overpasses, with graffiti-covered warehouse walls and industrial facilities replacing the city skyline view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive from a bleak industrial periphery toward the towering skyline of Night City before descending into a gritty urban district. It begins on a wet multi-lane highway, passing under an overpass and overtaking a white sedan while black smoke rises from distant factory smokestacks. As the vehicle progresses, the concrete barriers and power towers give way to a commercial corridor filled with large digital billboards and an emerging view of the distant city skyline. The scene then opens up with palm trees lining the road as the vehicle passes under the iconic welcome sign and approaches the dense traffic of the city limits. Finally, the camera follows the vehicle as it takes an exit ramp, shifting from the open highway into an enclosed industrial zone characterized by graffiti-covered warehouse walls and heavy overpasses.
